sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74872" key="o)re/ssaulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρέσσαυλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n74872.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀρείαυλος</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.233</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theaet.</author> </bibl>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4081.tlg001.perseus-grc1:107" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Coluth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">107</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
